mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1)todayAppup FROM app_accident_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = #{format}
SELECT COUNT(1) passAccident FROM app_push_bill WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = #{format}
SELECT COUNT(1) todayWxup FROM biz_accident WHERE DATE_FORMAT(createTime,'%Y-%m-%d') = #{format}
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount),0)FROM biz_wx_pay_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = #{format} AND return_code = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_wx_pay_record WHERE DATE_FORMAT(create_time,'%Y-%m-%d') = #{format} AND return_code = 'SUCCESS'
